---
title: 'In Christ Confession'
date: '2011-10-01T13:28:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8486852376400418267'
blogger_filename: '/2011/10/in-christ-confession.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'EMIC'
  - 'study'
---

<b><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: x-large;">In Christ:</span></b><br /><br /><b>I am a new creation and His workmanship</b>.(2Cor 5:17, Gal 6:15, Eph 2:10)<b> The veil is taken from my mind so I see clearly!</b> (2 Cor 3:14)<b> I am anointed and sealed, triumphant and called with a holy calling.</b> (2 Cor 1:21, 2 Cor 2:14, 2 Tim 1:9) <b>I am abounding in the knowledge of Christ and every good thing is in me.</b> (2 Pet 1:8, Philemon 1:6) <b>God's will in Christ for me is to rejoice, pray, and be thankful in all things.&nbsp;</b>(1 Thess 5:18) <b>There is NO condemnation in me!</b> (Rom 8:1) <b>I am made alive, even if I die I should rise again!</b> (1 Cor 15:22, 1 Thess 4:16) <b>The Lord will perfect that which concerns me! </b>(Psalms 138:8
